title: Boardroom Governance Podcast: 'One of My Biggest Fears Was How Governance Experts Would React'
summary: Eric joins governance expert Evan Epstein for episode 204 of the Boardroom Governance podcast. Epstein called the book 'thoughtful, provocative, and highly relevant for anyone thinking seriously about governance, incentives, and building institutions that last.'
blockquote: One of my biggest fears when writing this book was imagining how genuine governance experts would react to it. Evan's response — thoughtful, provocative, and highly relevant — is exactly the kind of serious engagement this topic deserves.
